title: Systematic Benchmarking of High-Throughput Subcellular Spatial Transcriptomics Platforms Across Human Tumors
notes: Multi-platform spatial transcriptomics benchmark across 5 platforms and 3 cancer types. Complex multi-metric evaluation with orthogonal CODEX and scRNA-seq ground truth. Tests ability to organize platform comparisons across 7 evaluation dimensions with nuanced trade-off discussions.
